purpose: Executable checklist for turning the A733/Cubie A7S review snapshot into a human-approved b4 reflect candidate.
hard_guardrails: Do not send from patches/ directly.
Do not send local A733 CCU or pinctrl scaffolding while the external RFCs are in flight.
Do not encode vendor U-Boot workarounds in upstream DTS.
Do not expand the initial series into Ethernet, VPU, display, USB-C, PCIe, or wireless.
Do not run b4 send --reflect until scripts/kernel-b4-final-gate passes on the final regenerated branch.

required_gates.command: Create a fresh named final review branch from the intended prerequisite base, then apply/regenerate the four A733 patches from source commits.
required_gates.pass: Branch is named, non-detached, contains exactly the final four A733 commits, and has no unrelated dirty files.

required_gates.command: Recheck public RTC, CCU/PRCM, and pinctrl dependency state.
required_gates.pass: Cover letter and b4 dependency metadata reflect current accepted/RFC state.

evidence.observed_state: RTC remains v1 PATCH 0/7; CCU/PRCM remains PATCH RFC 0/8; pinctrl remains RFC 0/9.

required_gates.command: Run b4 prep and edit cover metadata non-destructively.
required_gates.pass: b4 prep --show-info no longer reports needs-editing.

evidence.cover_subject: arm64: dts: allwinner: add A733/Cubie A7S DTS support

required_gates.command: Run b4 prep --edit-deps and encode prerequisite series.
required_gates.pass: b4 prep --show-info no longer reports has-prerequisites: False, and b4 prep --check-deps passes or any limitation is documented.

evidence.documented_limitation: b4 check-deps can fetch all prerequisite message-id threads but cannot cleanly apply the full prerequisite stack plus this series to the recorded local base.

required_gates.command: Run b4 prep --auto-to-cc and compare against scripts/get_maintainer.pl output.
required_gates.pass: b4 prep --show-info no longer reports needs-recipients or needs-auto-to-cc.

required_gates.command: Run scripts/kernel-validation-floor against the final branch/export.
required_gates.pass: Validation floor passes from the final intended base.
Gate passes with no open b4 metadata/preflight blockers.

required_gates.command: Human runs b4 send --reflect only after gates 01-07 pass.
required_gates.pass: Reflect copy is received and reviewed by the human; no real list send before this.

current_known_blockers: b4 preflight still reports expected MAINTAINERS/RFC-compatible warnings.
Strix checkpatch subprocess cannot import Python ply for spdxcheck.py via /usr/bin/python3.
